hero.sub: InterConsulta Audit AG is your established Swiss audit and advisory firm for SMEs, start-ups, and entrepreneurs in Zurich.

about.label: About the company
about.p1: InterConsulta Audit AG is an established auditing and consulting firm based in the heart of Zurich. We act as an independent authority that focuses on quality, discretion, and reliability.
about.p2: Our clients — from dynamic start-ups to traditional SMEs — appreciate our clear language, structured methodology, and reliable results. We don't deliver empty phrases, but facts that give you security for far-reaching corporate decisions.

services.headline: Our Services
services.sub: Precise, legally compliant, and structured audit processes. We act as an independent partner for your financial integrity.

s1.title: Statutory Audit
s1.desc: Comprehensive audit of your annual financial statements for maximum financial transparency and security.

s2.title: Limited Statutory Examination
s2.desc: Legally compliant, efficient audit services for established SMEs in Switzerland.

s3.title: Ordinary Audit
s3.desc: In-depth audit processes for larger corporate groups and demanding structures.

s4.title: Audit-related Advisory
s4.desc: Special audits, due diligence, and expert opinions for complex corporate transactions.

s5.title: Business Consulting
s5.desc: Sparring partner for CFOs and executive boards regarding strategic financing.

founder.label: Leadership
founder.quote: «Independence does not mean distance, but the courage to call things by their name with maximum clarity.»
founder.desc: As the founder and lead auditor of InterConsulta Audit AG, I am personally committed to auditing standards that not only tick checklists, but foster strategic corporate progress.

f1.title: Personal Support
f1.desc: You communicate directly with decision-makers, no tedious internal bureaucracy.

f2.title: Expertise
f2.desc: Many years of experience in auditing complex corporate structures.

f3.title: Discreet Cooperation
f3.desc: Absolute confidentiality and protection of your business-critical data.

f4.title: Local Roots
f4.desc: In the middle of Zurich, close to our clients throughout Switzerland.

s1.title: Initial Contact
s1.desc: Non-binding discussion to get to know each other.

s2.title: Needs Assessment
s2.desc: Analysis of your structure and requirements.

contact.headline: Get in touch
contact.sub: Discreet, professional, and without obligation. We treat your inquiry strictly confidentially.
contact.name: Name

footer.tagline: Your Reliable Swiss Auditing Firm. Tailor-made audit and advisory.
